nasb.text: They finished investigating all the men who had married foreign wives by the first day of the first month.

esv.text: and by the first day of the first month they had come to the end of all the men who had married foreign women.

cnv.text: 直到正月初一，他們才完成審查所有娶了外族的女子為妻的人。

ccb.text: 到次年一月一日才查清娶外族女子为妻的人。
